name: icp-classification
description: Classify companies into ICP segments from company descriptions using casual, normalized business language

accuracy.description: Fields are factually correct given the input. Industry matches, size is right, decision makers are plausible.

label_normalization.description: Uses casual, normalized business language. No corporate jargon, no full title expansions, no formal industry taxonomy.

completeness.description: All required fields present with substantive values. No 'N/A' or placeholder answers.

specificity.description: Pain points and reasoning are specific to this company, not generic filler.
